models.service_notes: Always confirm full model sticker, serial label, PCB revision, and connector layout before final parts ordering for Daewoo DWD-715.

faults.title: Water inlet issue
faults.description: Check water source, inlet valve, and mesh filter.

faults.title: Drain issue
faults.description: Inspect drain pump, filter, and hose for blockage.

faults.title: Door lock issue
faults.description: Inspect interlock, strike, door alignment, and wiring.

faults.title: Unbalance / load issue
faults.description: Redistribute load and inspect dampers / suspension.

faults.title: Heating / thermistor issue
faults.description: Check heater, NTC, relay, and board control.

faults.title: Motor drive issue
faults.description: Inspect motor, belt/direct drive system, sensor, and board.

boards.name: Main PCB
boards.notes: Verify against full sticker, revision, and connector layout before ordering.

boards.name: Display / UI PCB
boards.notes: Confirm fascia type, language panel, and harness pin count.

boards.name: Inverter / Motor Drive PCB
boards.notes: Present on inverter models only; verify direct-drive vs belt platform.

parts.notes: Match latch type and connector style.
Confirm voltage, impeller body, and mounting bracket.
Check single/double/triple valve configuration.
Verify resistance curve and connector type.
Match stroke length and lower pin diameter.
Confirm drum opening diameter and recirculation nozzle positions.

faults.title: Water inlet issue
faults.description: Check water source, inlet valve, and mesh filter.

faults.title: Drain issue
faults.description: Inspect drain pump, filter, and hose for blockage.

faults.title: Door lock issue
faults.description: Inspect interlock, strike, door alignment, and wiring.

faults.title: Unbalance / load issue
faults.description: Redistribute load and inspect dampers / suspension.

faults.title: Heating / thermistor issue
faults.description: Check heater, NTC, relay, and board control.

faults.title: Motor drive issue
faults.description: Inspect motor, belt/direct drive system, sensor, and board.
